pattern: The first-letter absorption proxy is degenerate: it returns exactly 0.0 on 26 of 27 GPT-2 checkpoints in E1 and 9 of 10 checkpoints in E3. A metric with near-zero variance cannot support claims about architectural tradeoffs or Pareto dominance.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: H3 is not merely unsupported—the task-agnostic metric is NEGATIVELY correlated with the first-letter benchmark (r = -0.592, p = 0.12). This suggests the two metrics measure different phenomena, not the same underlying construct.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: E1's architecture comparison conflates families. The summary table compares only 'Standard' (n=23) vs. 'feature_splitting' (n=4), but the 27-checkpoint corpus includes TopK, TopK_MLP, TopK_Attn, and multiple hook-point variants lumped into 'Standard'.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: The pilot_summary.md explicitly rates metric quality as NO-GO for publication-ready numbers because the simplified absorption/hedging proxies are too crude and dead-neuron estimates are unreliable at 2k tokens. Yet the main paper presents these exact numbers as primary evidence.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: The paper uses causal language ('causal cost,' 'unique causal effect') for E2, which is an observational meta-analysis. The section titles and abstract repeatedly use causal framing that overreaches the design.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: The Gemma-2-2B experiment (e1_full_gemma) failed due to gated HuggingFace access. The paper mentions this as a limitation but still frames the work as spanning 'Gemma-2-2B and Pythia-160M' in the abstract, giving readers the impression that modern models were directly evaluated in the controlled Pareto analysis.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Figure 4 is introduced for the first time in the Discussion (Section 7.1) with no forward reference in any prior section. This breaks the paper's own convention and will confuse readers.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: Tables 1-3 are rendered as inline markdown tables without LaTeX labels or captions. The outline explicitly planned labeled LaTeX tables for NeurIPS submission.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: Terminology is inconsistent: 'feature-splitting' vs. 'feature_splitting', 'CE recovered' vs. 'CE loss recovered' vs. '$\text{CE}_{\text{recovered}}$', 'JumpReLU' vs. 'JumpRelu'. TopK_MLP and TopK_Attn appear in E3 but are not defined in the glossary.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: The E3 pilot uses only 10 checkpoints and one hierarchy domain (geography). The paper acknowledges this but does not pre-register a replication protocol for expanding to 20-50 checkpoints and multiple domains.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: DATA INTEGRITY: Paper reports absorbed mean CMI=0.687 (Abstract, Introduction, Section 6.2). Source data cmi_estimation.json records 0.6492 (5.9% error). Mann-Whitney U=41.0 in paper vs 28.0 in source. p=0.042 in paper vs 0.04514 in source. Vocabulary sizes inconsistent: 1,092 (CMI), 1,196 (confound decomposition), 1,204 (first_letter_improved). L0=82 absorption rate appears as both 14.39% (confound) and 15.96% (first_letter_improved). Multiple errors across central statistical claims will cause reviewer rejection.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: HEDGING CLASSIFICATION BIAS: Confound decomposition defines 'hedging' as any false negative resolving at ANY higher L0. At L0=176, only 10/1,195 tokens remain as false negatives (99.2% resolve trivially because 8x more features fire). Classification does NOT check whether the SPECIFIC parent latent fires -- only whether the token stops being FN. Hedging count (648) = total_FN_at_L0_22 (657) - persistent_core (9). The 98.6% hedging figure is an upper bound that includes compensatory resolution, probe behavior changes, and genuine hedging indiscriminately.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: ACTIVATION PATCHING ON 9 CORE WORDS UNEXECUTED: The 9 persistent core words (e.g., 'eight', 'lower', 'liked', 'offer', 'often') are claimed as genuine hierarchy-driven absorption, but validation by activation patching (zero child feature -> check parent recovery) was never performed. Without this, the claim rests on observational cross-L0 persistence classification with known bias. This is also the ONLY experiment that can distinguish 'metric miscalibrated' from 'JumpReLU genuinely has minimal absorption.' Estimated 0.5-1 GPU-hour.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: CMI DIMENSION INSTABILITY: CMI-absorption correlation at d'=10 (rho=-0.383, p=0.059 uncorrected) reverses sign at d'>=20 (d'=20: rho=+0.048, d'=30: rho=+0.299, d'=50: rho=+0.197). Bonferroni-corrected p=0.236. Sign reversal is qualitative failure, not sensitivity issue. d'=10 was not pre-registered as primary dimension. Explanations (post-hoc signal capture at low d', k-NN estimator bias, probe quality confound) are equally plausible.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: PROBE QUALITY CONFOUND IN CMI ANALYSIS: Absorption rate correlates with probe F1 at rho=-0.67 (p<0.001). CMI-absorption analysis uses rates from L0=82 where mean probe F1=0.817. Low-CMI letters may be inherently harder to probe, causing both low estimated CMI and artificially high absorption rates. Paper never computes partial correlation controlling for probe F1, nor restricts CMI analysis to 10 quality-gated letters (F1>0.85).
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: CONTROL FAILURE UNDIAGNOSED: Paper identifies central finding (shuffled > measured across all 5 domains, ratios 2.7x to infinity) but never explains WHY. Without mechanistic diagnosis, cannot recommend recalibration, distinguish miscalibration from structural difference, or predict transferability to other metrics/architectures. Threshold sensitivity results already computed (141KB ablation_threshold_sensitivity.json) but not reported.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: THEORETICAL OVERCLAIMING: Section 6 title 'CMI Predicts Absorption Susceptibility' -- p=0.059/0.236 does not constitute prediction. Abstract: 'predicts absorption susceptibility.' Introduction: 'first information-theoretic criterion.' Phase transition prediction L0_crit=24.7 vs empirical 22.4 is partly circular (lambda fit from data); non-trivial prediction (rank ordering) has rho=+0.333 (p=0.103), non-significant. Systematic overclaiming in theoretical sections contrasts with excellent honesty in negative results.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: STRUCTURAL REDUNDANCY: Control failure finding stated 4 times (Introduction para 2, Section 4.1 opening, post-Table-2 summary, Section 4.4 opening). Near-verbatim sentence about 'higher absorption scores to randomized labels' appears in both Introduction and Section 4.1. Section 5.3 (~200 words) presents fully confounded cross-model comparison (JumpReLU on Gemma 2B vs L1 on GPT-2 Small: different architectures, parameters, training data).
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: TITLE MISLEADING: 'Beyond Competitive Exclusion' implies competitive exclusion is disproven. Paper shows the Chanin METRIC conflates hedging with competitive exclusion on JumpReLU SAEs; whether competitive exclusion genuinely exists is left unanswered (pending activation patching on 9 core words).
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: CROSS-DOMAIN NOVELTY SELF-CONTRADICTION: Paper simultaneously claims 'first cross-domain absorption characterization' (Section 4.4 novelty) and admits 'all rates fall below shuffled controls, so absolute rates cannot be interpreted as genuine absorption.' Cannot claim credit for first measurements and admit they are meaningless.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: All hierarchy probes achieve AUROC=1.0 exactly (80/80 perfect scores). This means the absorption formula's numerator (acc_resid - acc_sae) is bounded by (1.0 - acc_sae), minimizing absolute absorption scores. The paper mentions this as a limitation but does not address whether the ceiling effect itself invalidates the metric adaptation.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Severe underpowering: n=26 features with strongly right-skewed absorption distribution (18-26 of 26 features below 10% absorption). Observed correlations (-0.30 to +0.01) fall below the ~65% power threshold for |r|>=0.50. The study cannot distinguish between a true zero effect and a small-to-medium true effect that the sample size failed to detect. Layer 8 H1 (r=-0.301, p=0.136) shows a negative trend that would likely achieve significance with n~85, yet the conclusion frames this as evidence of no relationship rather than insufficient power.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Single model family (GPT-2 Small, 124M parameters) with shallow first-letter features. GPT-2 Small may simply not exhibit absorption strongly enough to produce measurable task degradation. The first-letter hierarchy (A -> Apple/Ant/April) is shallow and uniform compared to semantic hierarchies (animal -> mammal -> dog -> poodle) that may produce stronger absorption and clearer degradation.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Steering robustness confound undermines the central test. Steering adds the decoder direction W_dec[phi(f)] directly to the residual stream, bypassing the encoder entirely. Even if the parent latent fails to fire naturally, the injected direction still influences the output. This mechanism may be inherently robust to the type of absorption measured by differential correlation, which captures activation redistribution among latents (encoder behavior) rather than direction degradation in the decoder. Feature U (A=0.242) achieving 100% steering success at s=50 is exactly what we would expect if steering bypasses the encoder---yet it is presented as surprising evidence.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Missing random feature baseline for steering. Without a random baseline, we cannot determine whether steering effects are specific to the feature direction or would occur with any decoder direction. If random directions also produce steering success rates of 0.70+, the observed steering effects are uninformative about absorption.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Only two downstream tasks tested (steering and probing), and only at two layers (4 and 8). Circuit finding with activation patching and model editing---tasks that require precise feature isolation---may be more sensitive to absorption. The sparse probing task uses L1-regularized logistic regression which can leverage correlated latents, making it resilient to single-feature absorption.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Single absorption metric (Chanin differential correlation). The null result may be specific to the differential correlation definition rather than absorption generally. SAEBench includes an ablation-based absorption metric that may capture different failure modes. JumpReLU SAEs reportedly show stronger absorption under alternative metrics.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: H3 (cross-layer consistency) is tested with only two layers (4 and 8), making the 'inconsistency' claim statistically weak. With only two data points for slope comparison, opposite signs are sufficient to reject consistency but the CV computation (CV=0.932 for H2) is based on just two slopes. The paper presents this as strong evidence of inconsistency, but with n=2 slope pairs, the CV has no statistical meaning.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: The abstract and conclusion make claims stronger than the evidence supports. The abstract states: 'These null results suggest that feature absorption... may not be a critical failure mode for steering and probing in GPT-2 Small SAEs.' The word 'suggest' softens the claim, but the overall framing presents the null result as informative evidence against absorption being critical. Given the severe power limitations, a more accurate framing is: 'We find no statistically significant correlation, but our study is underpowered for small-to-medium effects and limited to a single model family with shallow features.'
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: The core novelty claim---that this is the 'first systematic study connecting absorption detection to downstream task performance'---is accurate but the contribution is primarily methodological rather than substantive. The paper's value lies in establishing the methodology (four-phase pipeline) and reporting an honest null result, not in overturning the field's understanding of absorption. A reviewer may ask: if the study is underpowered and limited to one model, what actionable insight does it provide beyond 'someone should do a larger study'? The gap between the ideation phase's ambitious proposals (scaling laws, theoretical frameworks, cross-domain analogies) and the executed narrow correlation study is substantial.
suggestion: 提升想法质量：强调创新性、与 related work 区分、明确贡献。

pattern: No formal methodology.md or plan document was found in the workspace. The planning appears to have been done implicitly during ideation, with the final experimental design emerging from the empiricist perspective's Candidate B. This lack of a formal plan makes it difficult to evaluate whether the experimental design was carefully considered or ad hoc. No pre-registered power analysis, no sample size justification, no pre-registered falsification criteria beyond p<0.05.
suggestion: 细化实验计划：明确资源需求、拆分子任务、预估 GPU 时间。

pattern: E1 architecture comparison is massively confounded: JumpReLU is pretrained on Gemma data with d_SAE=24,576 while TopK is trained from scratch on OpenWebText with d_SAE=16,384. The 4x collision rate difference (15.4% vs 3.8%) cannot be attributed to architecture alone---it confounds architecture, training data, dictionary size, and training procedure.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Dead feature ratio of 89-99% across all trained SAEs indicates catastrophic training failure. With 96-99% dead features, the SAE is effectively operating with only 160-640 active features out of 16,384. This likely invalidates all trained-SAE results.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: H2-H4 are all falsified (near-zero correlations, p > 0.86), yet the paper frames this as a 'reframing' contribution rather than acknowledging that the experiments may simply be underpowered or the wrong measurement. With n=5-6 data points, the study has ~20% power to detect medium effects.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: The collision rate metric itself is problematic. It measures whether multiple concepts activate the same feature, but this is not the same as Chanin et al.'s absorption (parent suppressing child under co-occurrence). Without parent-child hierarchy testing, calling this 'absorption' is misleading.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: E2 (causal impact) uses only 5 k-values as the independent variable, but these 5 points are not independent---they come from the same training run with different k. The 'causal' claim is weak because k directly controls both sparsity and reconstruction quality, creating a structural confound.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: UAD and DFDA are severely underpowered proof-of-concepts framed as contributions. UAD validated on only 25 first-letter collisions. DFDA evaluated on only 4 pairs, all sharing the same feature (18486), with one pair showing degradation (-21.4%).
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Single-seed experiments (seed=42) with no replication. All correlation p-values hover around 0.87, suspiciously uniform. The pilot showed 30.8% collision for TopK while the full experiment shows 3.8%---an 8x discrepancy never explained.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: The core novelty claim is weakened by the confounded comparison. If the 4x difference is driven by training data/width rather than architecture, the 'cross-architecture benchmark' contribution evaporates. The actual contribution may be limited to a narrow negative result.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Abstract claims '11.1% MSE improvement' for DFDA but omits the critical 'per-pair residual' qualifier, inflating the claim. Title uses 'Feature Absorption' while experiments measure 'collision rate,' blurring the distinction.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: Section 3.6 claims 'approximately 20% power to detect a medium effect size (r = 0.5).' This is a post-hoc power analysis, which is methodologically questionable---power should be computed before the experiment.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: Multiple comparisons problem: H1b at layer 8 (Pearson p=0.028, Spearman p=0.009) does NOT survive Bonferroni correction (alpha=0.0042 for 12 tests) or Benjamini-Hochberg FDR (q=0.05 rejects all 12 hypotheses). The paper has ZERO statistically significant results after proper correction. The abstract, introduction, and conclusion all present H1b as evidence of a real effect, which is incorrect.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: Severe underpowering: n=26 features with strongly right-skewed absorption distribution (18-22 of 26 features per layer show absorption below 5%). Maximum absorption rate is only 0.242. With ~64% power to detect |r| >= 0.50 at alpha=0.05, observed correlations (-0.30 to +0.01) fall below the detection threshold. The layer 8 H1 trend (r=-0.301, p=0.136) would require n~85 for 80% power.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Steering robustness confound undermines the central test. Steering adds decoder direction W_dec[phi(f)] directly to the residual stream, bypassing the encoder entirely. The Chanin metric measures encoder-side activation redistribution, but steering uses decoder-side directions. Feature U (A=0.242) achieving 100% steering success at s=50 is exactly what we expect if steering bypasses the encoder. The delta metric does not establish that the remaining effect is due to absorption specifically.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Single model family (GPT-2 Small, 124M parameters) with shallow first-letter features. GPT-2 Small may simply not exhibit absorption strongly enough to produce measurable task degradation. The first-letter hierarchy is shallow and uniform compared to semantic hierarchies.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Claims stronger than evidence in abstract and conclusion. The abstract presents H1b as a significant finding. The Conclusion's 'practitioners should use delta-corrected steering metrics' depends on H1b being a real effect; if H1b is a false positive, this recommendation loses all empirical support.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: Only two downstream tasks tested (steering and probing), and only at two layers (4 and 8). Circuit finding and model editing may be more sensitive to absorption. The sparse probing task uses L1-regularized logistic regression which can leverage correlated latents.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: Single absorption metric (Chanin differential correlation). The null result may be specific to the differential correlation definition rather than absorption generally. SAEBench includes an ablation-based absorption metric that may capture different failure modes.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: H3 (cross-layer consistency) tested with only two layers (4 and 8). With n=2 slope pairs, the CV has no statistical meaning. Layer 0 and 10 absorption data were collected but never used.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: The core novelty claim is accurate but the contribution is primarily methodological rather than substantive. After multiple comparison correction, the paper has zero significant results. A reviewer will ask what actionable insight it provides beyond 'someone should do a larger study.' The gap between ideation ambition and execution narrowness persists.
suggestion: 提升想法质量：强调创新性、与 related work 区分、明确贡献。

pattern: 'Mixed results' phrasing appears at least 4 times (Abstract, Introduction 1.3, Section 6.1 heading, Conclusion 8.1). The writing review (score 8) explicitly flagged this and suggested varying the phrasing, but it was not fixed.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。
